mpc_line.reason: The current MPC surrogate/weighted policy line became comparable to the v0.14.3 P-only baseline but did not demonstrate stable superiority on the current calibrated offline model.

strict_mpc.reason: Strict MPC optimization should be introduced after the simulation platform supports replaceable controllers, reproducible scenarios, common metrics, and consistent safety constraints.

next_stage.name: modular offline controller simulation platform
next_stage.purpose: Build an extensible offline simulation platform where controllers are replaceable modules and the v0.14.3 P-only baseline is used as the reference controller.
